name: 108"x14" Table Runner Natural Woven - Threshold™
description:
Give a chic makeover to your dining table with the Woven Table Runner from Threshold™. This woven table runner showcases a subtle textured pattern in a natural finish and is decorated with fringe accents on all sides for added visual appeal. Made from a mix of cotton and jute material, this woven table runner helps protect your table from accidental spills and is suitable for any occasion. Plus, it's washable for easy upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
